message:
test(gesture): add 30 edge-case tests for GestureRecognizer (bd-3kkqc)

Cover drag-without-mouse-down, Moved cancels long press, escape/focus
during unstarted drag, SUPER modifier chord, long press at exact
threshold boundary, negative drag deltas, zero drag-threshold/click-
tolerance configs, scroll/repeat events ignored, mouse-up position
becomes click pos, multiple mouse-downs overwrite state, sequential
drags, chord timeout + restart, DragStart+DragMove co-emission,
u16::MAX coordinates, reset during pending long press.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
